passions_detected.false_judgement: That lack of acknowledgement means personal worthlessness — entitlement to respect based on time invested
That desiring credit makes its absence a genuine deprivation
That others' spending validates the need to compare and measure against them
That losing an earbud charger is a genuine deprivation worthy of strong reaction

causal_observations.description: Core pattern: assents to the impression that others' lack of acknowledgement = personal worthlessness. This is the primary assent failure across the journal.
Generates manipulative strategy impressions — plans to influence what is outside control before recognising this as a false approach.
Beautiful metaphor of leaf on stream vs sidecar on motorbike — developing understanding of flexible assent vs rigid control.

value_observations.observed_as: still generates strong emotional energy — not yet truly classified as indifferent

value_observations.declared_as: the only valid source of motivation
value_observations.observed_as: genuine insight — 'Internal standards and goals are always refined'

virtue_observations.evidence: Articulates the mean value concept — 'the right amount of each virtue at any time'. Leaf-on-stream metaphor shows genuine philosophical understanding.
Recognises need to relinquish control without malice. Working toward equanimity with praise and criticism.
Withheld verbal retaliation when called 'dear' incorrectly — chose restraint over habitual verbal crushing.

key_passages.summary: Core insight on curiosity replacing disappointment — 'ignorance/obliviousness is not malicious, selfishness is not about you'
Zero-sum insight on praise/criticism — 'only from deriving zero internal motivation from external praise can I derive zero dismotivation from criticism'
Leaf on stream metaphor — riding the current with flexible virtue rather than rigid control on a motorbike sidecar
